name_en: 26C Series Blue Suede CF Bag, classic quilted pattern + light gold hardware, retro and premium! Suede is soft and delicate, perfect for autumn/winter vibes. Chain with leather wrap design, works for shoulder or crossbody. Perfect size, super practical for daily outings. The 26C series colors and materials have a strong vacation vibe, a must-have for fashionistas!
name_cn:
26C Series Blue Suede CF Bag, classic quilted pattern + light gold hardware, retro and premium! Suede is soft and delicate, perfect for autumn/winter vibes. Chain with leather wrap design, works for shoulder or crossbody. Perfect size, super practical for daily outings. The 26C series colors and materials have a strong vacation vibe, a must-have for fashionistas!
Style AS5987
Size 18-26-7
